ddls:
CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "step" INTEGER /* Step number of the experiment */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration of hyperparameters as a string */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature setting used during the experiment */,
  "candidate_value" INTEGER /* Candidate value for the performance metric */,
  "accepted_value" INTEGER /* Accepted value based on the tuning criteria */,
  "best_value" INTEGER /* Best value achieved in this experiment */,
  "experiment_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "experiment_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the data scientist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data scientist) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the dataset is stored */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "step" INTEGER /* Step number of the experiment */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project involved in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id")
)
